created_for: FREEZE point: v0.3 gated-hybrid first model confirmed and frozen (intent 0.86 / e2e 0.82 / critical 0) for adoption in other projects + real-data accumulation. Includes the built collection pipeline and two confirmed-negative small-batch data rounds. Freeze record: docs/INTENT_MODEL_v0_3_FROZEN_2026-06-16.md

state.milestone: v0.3 router functional end-to-end + direct LLM-free fast path for trivial smalltalk (greetings answer in ~ms with no LLM, vs 5-8s on a reasoning backend). gate-promoted gated-hybrid intent model + tier map + route_and_execute + calculator tool + HTTP service. sealed v2 remains closed (0.90; baseline 0.82).
